perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair sits behind a table featuring two plates: one with several large pieces of raw white onion and another with a carton of dumplings. She starts by gesturing with her hands and speaking directly to the camera with an expressive face. (2) She picks up a bottle of sauce and pours it over the dumplings. Using chopsticks, she takes a piece of onion, places a dumpling on top of it, and eats the combined bite, reacting with wide eyes and a surprised expression to the flavor/spiciness. (3) For the second phase, she adds a darker red sauce to the dumplings and repeats the process of eating a large mouthful. (4) For the third bite, she sandwiches a dumpling between two layers of onion, creating a 'sandwich' effect, and consumes it in one massive bite. (5) After swallowing, she appears to be struggling with the spiciness or size of the bite, clutching her throat. She then pulls out a red can of Coca-Cola, opens it with a distinct pop, and drinks it to soothe her mouth.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A lighthearted, mid-tempo jazzy track featuring piano and soft percussion starts immediately. A female voice speaks in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, narrating a plan. (2) Rhythmic chewing sounds and a soft swallow are audible as she eats. (3) The female voice continues with a slightly humorous, self-justifying tone. (4) A sharp metallic 'clink' and 'pop' of a soda can opening is heard, followed by the sound of pouring or fizzing. (5) The music continues as she takes a long drink, ending with a satisfied but slightly defeated verbal conclusion.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '你們知道' (Do you know) - Hook text, curious. (2) '三口減肥法' (Three-bite diet method) - Topic title. (3) '你想吃的東西都可以吃' (You can eat anything you want) - Functional instruction. (4) '但只能吃三口' (But only three bites) - Rule setting. (5) '(小籠包)' (Xiao Long Bao) - Identifying the food. (6) '第一口' (First bite) - Step marker. (7) '先準備洋蔥！' (Prepare onions first!) - Instructional. (8) '果然配著洋蔥一起吃 整個口味變得超清爽耶' (Indeed eating with onions makes the flavor super refreshing) - Subjective review. (9) '有點辣' (A bit spicy) - Reaction. (10) '說一套，做一套' (Saying one thing, doing another) - Humorous commentary on her behavior. (11) '加了火雞辣醬' (Added Buldak sauce) - Detail. (12) '第二口' (Second bite) - Step marker. (13) '減肥太簡單了吧' (Losing weight is too easy) - Sarcastic hook. (14) '好好吃喔' (So delicious) - Emotional reaction. (15) '第三口' (Third bite) - Step marker. (16) '看起來有點像雪人' (Looks a bit like a snowman) - Decorative observation. (17) '反正能一口吃掉 不就好了嗎？' (Anyway, if I can eat it in one bite, isn't it fine?) - Humorous logic. (18) '突然喉嚨被噎到' (Suddenly got stuck in the throat) - Situational description. (19) '真的沒辦法' (Really no other way) - Resigned tone. (20) '只好喝了可樂' (Had to drink coke) - Action description. (21) '三口減肥法好簡單喔' (The three-bite diet is so easy) - Sarcastic summary.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Concept Intro -> Three Huge 'Bites' Demonstration -> Choking/Spiciness Climax -> Breaking the Diet with Soda

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator performing for the camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with long black hair, wearing a grey floral-patterned pajamas/loungewear top and red lipstick.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a beige/off-white wall and a light-colored wooden table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Concept Intro -> Step-by-Step Demonstration -> Humorous Twist
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic mukbang short intended to entertain viewers through the subversion of a 'diet trend'. The creator proposes a 'three-bite diet' but humorously exploits the rule by making each 'bite' an absurdly large combination of dumplings and onions, eventually failing the diet by drinking sugary soda to cope with the heat of the food.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display and consumption of Coca-Cola and Buldak spicy sauce within the comedic narrative.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show text overlays, exaggerated facial reactions to food, fast jump-cut editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages common social media tropes like 'diet hacks' and 'mukbang' to create relatable comedic content.
